event: Monumental ceiling mural of a laborer or builder
description: A monumental ceiling mural showing a massive male figure with reddish-brown skin, a beard, and muscular arms folded across his chest. He wears a simple gray garment and is surrounded by angular, geometric architectural forms in gray and brown tones. The figure is rendered in a powerful, heroic style characteristic of Mexican muralism. Below the mural, the architecture of the building is visible, including an arched doorway and a round stained-glass window with a geometric floral pattern. The perspective is dramatically foreshortened, viewed from below.

_meta.title: Ceiling of Colegio de San Ildefonso
